reviews.title: No way this is a 5 star hotel!! Maybe 2.5.
reviews.text: How can this be a 5 star hotel??? Maybe it was a 5 star hotel 30 years ago. They havent done any remodeling or repair on any of their stuff. Building is so run down.  They turn off the AC on all the room floors hallways. When no one is in the lobby, they turn off the AC as well. So the hotel is freaken hot most of the time. Room service was extremely slow. Didnt get my food  over 1 hours later. Another time, i tried to order a Australian steak, they said they ran out. I think it’s the most expensive food on their menu and they just dont stock it. They just put the steak on the menu just to show off. The staffs never and/or rarely put on a smile when they greet you. It’s liked someone kicked their dogs or something. They probably bought the title “5 star hotel.” Aint no way this is an actual 5 star hotel. Dont expect much, this place is terrible.
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
On behalf of the Board of Directors Muong Thanh Luxury Ca Mau Hotel, I would like to send greetings and thank you for choosing Muong Thanh Hotel as a place to stay and our services. We are appreciated your comments and sincerely we would like to apologize to you as some inconvenience issues  made you  uncomfortable. Through your valuable suggestions it will help us to improve the hotel services.
Best regards
Nguyen Ke Mao - General Manager

reviews.title: Large roomy hotel needs major upgrade.
reviews.positives: The hotel is large and feels really open both inside and out. Although it's not right in the down town area where most shops and restaurants are located, they're all in walking distance.
reviews.negatives:
The rooms needs some major upgrade. First off, even though its clean, the bathroom require maintenance. The showers drainage is poorly installed and water flooded the bathroom whenever it's being used. Even though there's a hot and cold setting, there's only one option. Cold shower. There's poorly lightings in the bathroom.
The carpet in the room looks old and dirty. The bedding is rough and the pillows old and lumpy. And all of this is in their VIP room.

reviews.title: Very disappointed when at Muong Thanh Ca Mau.
reviews.text: I have stayed at many Mường Thanh hotels from Nha Trang to Da Nang to Quang Binh, and I quite like Mường Thanh. However, my recent stay in Ca Mau was quite disappointing. The front desk staff spoke in a curt and annoyed manner; when I asked to borrow something, they did not explain to the customer and demanded to use the service (they spoke very condescendingly to the customers). The room was quite old and had some mold, and there was even no shampoo in the room. The breakfast was also not diverse. This time, I give 1 star for the service here, and I will not return.
reviews.response:
Chị Hà thân mến,
Trước tiên, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn chị đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn Mường Thanh Cà Mau, cũng như đã tin tưởng hệ thống khách sạn Mường Thanh trong các chuyến đi trước đây.
Chúng tôi rất tiếc và thành thật xin lỗi khi trải nghiệm lần này tại Cà Mau không đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của chị, đặc biệt là về thái độ phục vụ của nhân viên lễ tân, chất lượng phòng cũng như tiện nghi và bữa sáng. Đây chắc chắn không phải là tiêu chuẩn dịch vụ mà chúng tôi hướng tới. Phản hồi của chị là vô cùng quý giá và chúng tôi sẽ nghiêm túc xem xét, kiểm tra và chấn chỉnh lại toàn bộ quy trình phục vụ, cũng như nâng cấp chất lượng phòng và tiện ích nhằm phục vụ khách hàng tốt hơn trong thời gian tới.
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi về những bất tiện đã xảy ra và rất mong có cơ hội được đón tiếp và phục vụ chị tốt hơn trong tương lai.
Trân trọng,
Nguyễn Kế Mão - Giám đốc Điều hành

reviews.title: Deluxe twin
reviews.text: We booked 2 deluxe twin rooms at Mường Thanh Ca Mau through Agoda based on the previous reviews,  this hotel indicated on the website as a 5 star hotel,  maybe the hotel lobby is a 5 star but the rooms that we received is no more than a 2 star.  The 1st impression of the front desk receptionist is not too friendly, if not arrogant.   I didn't get her name, the 2nd one is much better.  The location is good, the breakfast is decent  Here are the cons:  The carpet is dirty, no hand soap provided, there are so many cracks in the washroom tiles  the toillet paper holder must have been broken because they have the toilet paper by the sink, the shower is dirty, the toilet spray gun is so rusted I'm shocked that this hotel has a 5 star rating, based on the things that we found  in room 815, this room itself is not even a 2 star in my opinion, you can see the attached pictures and decide ir for yourself.  I didn't make any complaints about any of this because I don't know if they will do any thing about, for myself,  I  will not coming back to this hotel  even the rate is cheap.  Now, I don't know if most of the rooms are like this or not in this hotel but room 815 is old and ugly.  Very disappointed!!
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Loc,
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback.
First of all, we sincerely apologize for the shortcomings you experienced during your stay, especially regarding the room condition, cleanliness, and maintenance issues. We truly regret that the facilities did not meet your expectations and the standards we strive to uphold.
We also apologize for the initial impression at the front desk. Your comments have been shared with the relevant departments for immediate review and improvement, including housekeeping, maintenance, and staff service training.
At the same time, we appreciate your positive remarks about our location and breakfast.
Your feedback is very important to us, and we are committed to improving our services and facilities. We hope to have another opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a much better experience.
Best regards,
Nguyen Ke Mao - General Manager

reviews.negatives: Diciamo tutto l'insieme.

reviews.title: Save your money and try a more 'local' hotel
reviews.text:
The room was a corner unit quite large with nice views facing two different directions (overlooking pool and tennis court). Staff was ok and English level was decent enough considering Ca Mau is not a major tourist destination. Free shuttle to airport which was nice. 

The room had been cleaned but was definitely showing its age. Some surfaces could really use a deep cleaning/replacement: semen stains on fabric headboard, the desk chair was badly stained, cigarette burns on carpet (even though it was a non-smoking room). There was also water damage in one of the ceiling corners. I just got off a 12 hour bus ride and wasnt in the mood to try to get another room. Overall I give the hotel 3 to 3.5 stars.

I recommend spending much less on a family/local owned hotel.

Cheers

Dear Ms/Mr,
Many thanks for your comment
Hope you will continue support our hotel in the future

reviews.text: Phòng rộng nhưng xa trung tâm, các thiết bị không hoạt động tốt (điều hoà, wifi không hoạt động ngay cả khi đã báo sửa, thảm cũ, mùi, nút bấm thang máy hỏng/ tắt 1 bên…), ăn sáng đơn điệu, sảnh lobby, hành lang nóng, giá phòng cao không tương xứng chất lượng
reviews.response:
Chị Thi thân mến,
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ phản hồi. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi trải nghiệm lưu trú tại khách sạn chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của Quý khách.

Chúng tôi chân thành xin lỗi về những bất tiện liên quan đến hệ thống điều hòa, wifi, tình trạng thảm, thang máy cũng như không gian chung chưa mang lại sự thoải mái. Đồng thời, ý kiến của Quý khách về chất lượng bữa sáng và mức giá phòng cũng đã được ghi nhận để khách sạn xem xét và cải thiện trong thời gian tới.

Những phản hồi của Quý khách là động lực để chúng tôi nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ và cơ sở vật chất tốt hơn.

Rất mong sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách lần nữa với trải nghiệm tích cực hơn.

Trân trọng,
Nguyễn Kế Mão - Giám đốc Điều hành

Nguyen Ke Mao - General Manager

Breakfast is average compared to other 3-star hotels in VN. The hotel is not within walking distance to city center.
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We apologize for the inconveniences you experienced during your stay. We're sorry to hear that the room and facilities did not meet your expectations, and we appreciate you bringing the cleanliness and maintenance issues to our attention. Regarding breakfast, we value your input and will work to improve the quality to better align with guest expectations. Thank you again for your comments, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back with an improved experience.
Best Regards,
Nguyen Ke Mao - General Manager

reviews.title: Disappointed new 5 star hotel in Ca mau
reviews.text: This is one of the few new hotels in Ca mau city and the only self claimed 5 star hotel! However, I was very disappointed with the facility and service offered! First, it claims to be a five star hotel but still uses the outdated solar energy for heating hot water-the old but inefficient way of heating, popular with mini hotels in Vietnam but not five star establishment! Therefore, it took forever for the water to warm up and even that it's just lukewarm! Then the water jet coming out of the shower head was not strong at all. Room was large, clean and modern but the decoration was of poor taste-it didn't match with the room style at all! Staff at the hotel was nice and helpful but that pretty much all it can offer! The breakfast was terrible with the food quality and the variety of choices.  It gave me the impression that the hotel try to cut corners in everything in order to cut cost!

reviews.positives: Good price, room size was very good. Breakfast was good as they allowed us to enter at 9.35am for leftovers.  Nice little children’s play area.
reviews.negatives: Staff refused to call a taxi for us and told us to go onto the street to find a taxi.  Their hotel car basically blocked the front entry and they seemed to be pushing you to use their hotel transport @600,000 dong per hour or 60km 20 times the price of a taxi.  This is not the conduct of a five star hotel. The basic furnishings and fittings are worn and lack proper maintenance for a five star hotel. Breakfast closed at 9.30am which again is not consistent with a five star hotel. Heavily stained carpet and limited in room items for a five star hotel.  At best a 3 star International hotel rating. The hotel is comfortable, Luxurious or Luxury is a very long stretch.

reviews.title: Nice room but not on par with "luxury" standards
reviews.text:
Maybe it was just my room but it had a big defect: the shower head aimed upwards however I tried to aim it, and the slope of the bathroom was aiming toward the entry way, making the water spill down there. I just took one shower and the entry was soaking wet. Most bathroom fixtures were pretty but defective actually. The joints on the tiles were also very amateurish. 

HOWEVER.... The hotel is situated in a designated new development area along with the Vincom Center and villas and trendy cafés and you can sense there is a lot of good will to give guests an upscale experience. The staff is really great and do their best to help. But perhaps local suppliers are still learning to provide that upscale touch. I came in this city 5 years ago and I can tell this place is orders of magnitude more classy than whatever was available in Ca Mau back then. So, keep up the good work and you'll get there!
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/ Mrs/ Ms.
Thank you for your recent stay at Muong Thanh Luxury Ca Mau.
In the order to enhance our service,  we’re constantly looking for guest feedback on how we can improve on your stay, and we appreciate you taking the time to give us your thoughts.
We’re sorry to hear that our smaller room size was a problem. The hotel room was designed enough for basic convenience but  we understand that this may not work for everyone and appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts with us as we’re always striving to please our guests.
Again, thank you for your candid feedback and  if I can be of any further assistance please do let me know
We are looking forward to welcoming you back to Muong Thanh Luxury Cà Mau in near future.



Kind Regards
(GM)

reviews.title: Good but a little bit far from downtown
reviews.text:
Good hotel with new facilities. Friendly staff. Breakfast with limited dishes.
For dinner you can ask chef for daily special, but wine list is not good enough, limited selection.
Far from downtown, approx 3kms but you can trolling down the street because Camau is a small town.
There's a supermarket aside the hotel, you can find your needs here and walk down to the pool, there's a coffeeshop by the pool that you can sit there and relax.
If you plan a family trip or a couple trip then Muong Thanh is good, but if you are a solo traveler like me, you shouldn't stay here because there's no nightlife activities around here, you must call a cab of motobike to ride you there to the downtown.
However, overall, i have good time (02 nights) at Muong Thanh

reviews.title: 5 star minimum
reviews.text: Seems like the do the minimum necessary for their five star rating in this somewhat dated hotel.  Breakfast is a good example.  Decent selection but not presented well or appetizing looking - a bland experience.  I think breakfast at a five star should be exceptional featuring local specialties. Another examples is housekeeping. They cleaned my room and bathroom except for toilet. One extremely small tube of bath gel in bathroom.  My friends in another room received just one as well to share between 2 people.  Cheap showerhead assembly wouldn't hold the showerhead when turned on. The room also had some bump and bruises with small damage here and there. I guess I expect a lot from five star hotel.  Also, the staff was polite and professional but seemed distant and unhappy. It certainly wasn't a luxury experience. If I ever came back to Ca Mau, I would spin the wheel and even try a lower rated hotel not because this hotel is bad, but because I know there are a lot of better 5 star hotel experiences out there with staff that smiles.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Scott,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We truly appreciate your honesty and are sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations.
We take all guest comments seriously and will be reviewing the issues you mentioned, including the presentation and variety of our breakfast, the housekeeping oversight, and the bathroom amenities. Your feedback helps us identify areas for improvement, and we will ensure that your concerns are addressed with the appropriate departments.
Please accept our sincere apologies for the inconvenience you experienced. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a stay that truly reflects the five-star standards we strive for.
Warm regards,
Nguyen Ke Mao - General Manager

reviews.title: First experience at Muong Thanh Ca Mau.
reviews.text:
- The hotel staff just watched as the guests carried their own luggage to the room without offering any assistance, and they didn't even accompany the guests to the room! Extremely lacking in proactivity.
- The TV only has basic channels, no smart TV, no YouTube, no Netflix.
- The breakfast buffet really had nothing at all, the price is comparable to other mid-range resort hotels but the food is really disappointing. Since the hotel also accepts outside guests, by around 9 AM, 85% of the food was gone. In fact, the main dishes were completely out with nothing left for the guests at the hotel, and the food wasn't tasty either.
reviews.response:
Anh/chị Lu thân mến,
Cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ ý kiến. Chúng tôi xin lỗi vì những trải nghiệm không tốt của anh/chị tại khách sạn. Về việc hỗ trợ hành lý và sự thiếu sót trong các dịch vụ giải trí, chúng tôi sẽ xem xét và cải thiện ngay. Chúng tôi cũng ghi nhận ý kiến về buffet sáng và sẽ làm việc với bộ phận liên quan để đảm bảo phục vụ đầy đủ và chất lượng hơn.
Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội đón tiếp anh/chị trở lại trong thời gian tới.

reviews.title: Best stay in Ca Mau
reviews.text:
Stayed here previously one time prior with my fiancée as she is from Ca Mau and visiting her family 
Thought we would stay here again and this time take an additional room with 3 beds for her father, sister and brother in law.  The next day my wife’s family who lives in Ca Mau was checking out and made them wait in the lobby because apparently there was 1 towel missing. The room should have had 3 towels but was stocked with just 2 and pretty much accused them of taking the towel. My wife who is also from Ca Mau was very angry and said the hotel treated them that way because they are Viet but if was me an American, would have been no problem. First of all, the hotel knows I booked that room on my credit card and if there was a problem they should have called me instead of treating my wife’s family like criminals...this to me sits poorly as the hotel itself and location otherwise is great. This was the downside of our stay. The upside to a great location is the free breakfast buffet .

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text:
Another good stay but always another surprise when staying here.
The flight from HCMC to Ca Mau always arrives at 7am and I always request an early checking.
This time, instead of allowing for early check in (as i have with previous stays) ,
i was told I needed to pay an additional fee for early check in because it was a holiday weekend.
Seriously!!!

Beyond that everything else was fun.
Staff is very good and as long as you insist on a room that is well kept, there are no issues.
Otherwise, you may end up with no hot water, dirty carpet , or some other annoying thing that you
don't expect in a fairly new hotel that is 5 stars.

reviews.title: Best in Ca Mau
reviews.text:
Now I know that's not saying much ...but remember....this is Ca Mau.
After our third stay, we finally got a room without peeling wallpaper or water leaking around the bathtub....hot water at all hours....and no stains on the carpet.
The breakfast is still very localized.....pool and gym are good......typical Vietnamese club....mini mart was good.
Will stay here again

The breakfast menu was quite similar for two days, but there were many varieties and it was really delicious! It is suitable for vacation, but not for tourism (there are no attractions nearby, and the attractions listed online are almost all misleading). I would give the hotel a score of 95 (deducting 5 points for the water bottle), but one should be cautious when combining it with tourism.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: quiet retreat
reviews.text: Ca Mau is a remote lightly visited area with not much to do or see. A day trip will take you to the southern tip of the country and it's extensive mangrove forests.  The Muong Thanh was a surprise find in such a remote place. Rooms are very spacious. Buffet breakfast is excellent and the hotel restaurant served served  excellent food at surprisingly low prices.  The huge pool is quiet and empty most of the day and a nice retreat. My main disappointment with the hotel was that the only flight in for the day arrives very early, and they charged us quite a lot of money for an early checkin. probably my fault since I had not researched the flights and found that there is only a single flight a day in and out of the airport! I suppose that if I had requested an early checkin on booking on Agoda I might not have been charged.  They wanted cash for half the daily room rate! I would stay here again if I had reason to return to Ca Mau

Definitely not an international organization and I need to temper my expectations. In other places I’ve stayed... flowers and even a bottle of wine were complimentary for honeymooners/ anniversaries. Still a nice stay and for Vietnam standards... top notch

reviews.title: Muong Thanh Hotel
reviews.text:
When talking about Dien Bien Phu, we always take pride in the indomitable spirit of the Vietnamese people in the fight against foreign invaders and in the struggle for national independence. Perhaps this indomitable spirit needs to be carried on by our future generations in the fields of economy and nation-building, as well as to express our gratitude to the ancestors who sacrificed for the beautiful country we have today.

When we mention Dien Bien Phu, we always think of Muong Thanh. This place used to be the central base of the Northwest troops at the Dien Bien Phu base and the headquarters of General Christian de Castries.

Muong Thanh Hotel is the name that reminds me of the indomitable spirit of Dien Bien Phu in the economic front, where the soldiers on this front are the very hosts of this hotel. Let's check in and see how it goes; it’s advertised online as 5 stars with prices slightly over 1 million (equivalent to 2-3 stars in Hanoi and Saigon). I’m skeptical and need to check in out of curiosity because the price is so low, raising doubts about quality. After checking in, the results were as in the images.

Wow!!! So beautiful, class like distilled water and very cheap, the service is very much like that of the southwestern region, friendly and enthusiastic. It feels like a proper 5-star experience but still familiar. A 5-star experience for Vietnamese people that we don’t see in other 5-star hotels around the world.

The spirit of Dien Bien Phu for the Vietnamese has succeeded with the 5-star Muong Thanh hotel brand, making Vietnamese people feel proud across the country.

Accompanying images show the 5-star Muong Thanh Ca Mau hotel, which is rated as the most beautiful and modern in Ca Mau at this time.

A must-visit check-in spot for anyone traveling to Ca Mau.

reviews.title: Le meilleur choix de Cà Mau, mais ce n'est pas un 5*.
reviews.text:
L'hôtel n'est pas en centre-ville commerçant mais dans un nouveau quartier. Propre, bien éclairé. Cependant, services, commerces aux alentours suffisent largement.

Le personnel est efficace, serviable et d'une grande gentillesse. Au regard des standards internationaux d'un établissement 5 étoiles, l'équipement général est correct, sans finesse, sans plus. Plutôt 4* que 5. La chambre est lumineuse, de belle surface et bien équipée, malgré quelques défauts ergonomiques.

De toute façon, les choix restent limités dans cette magnifique région.

reviews.title: Keine 5 Sterne
reviews.text: Unfreundliches Personal  an der Rezeption. Nicht gut wenn man schon unfreundlich empfangen wird. Der Zimmerservice lies auch zu wünschen übrig. Nichtmal  Toilettenpapier und Seife zum Duschen ausreichen vorhanden .

reviews.title: Für 5 Sterne fehlt noch einiges  ;-)
reviews.text:
Die  Zimmer : alles Sperrholzmöbel, sauber, alles da, was man braucht: Kühlschrank, Duschgel, Schampoo, Zahnbürsten, Kamm etc. . Nur ein Stuhl, so dass die 2. Person mit dem Laptop im Bett arbeiten muss.  Die Zimmer wurden erst kurz vor Mittag gereinigt, obwohl wir jeden Morgen um 7 Uhr schon aus dem Haus waren.  Von morgens 6 bis abends 22 Uhr hörte man im Zimmer ein leises nerviges Gedudel.
Frühstück:  Da war alles da, das Essen auch warm, bzw. Heiß. Es hat an nichts gefehlt.  Das hat 5 Sterne verdient.
Im Hotel: Die Rooftop-Bar im 16. Stock gibt es gar nicht. Außenanlagen waren quasi nicht vorhanden, außer am Pool ein paar Stühle.  (Im Vergleich das New Palace in Bac Lieu kostet die Hälfte und hat wunderschöne Außenanlagen) . Auf den Etagen konnte man nirgends sitzen, während man darauf wartete, dass man inst Zimmer konnte. Im Eingangsbereich roch es immer nach Essen.
Personal: Die Leute waren alle sehr freundlich, auch wenn sie nichts verstanden haben. 
Lage: Nähe Vogelpark

reviews.title: 까마우 가족단위 최고위호텔
reviews.text:
가격대비 완벽한 리조트였습니다.
수영장 및 직원태도, 다만 호텔안의 스파는 지금까지 이용해본 스파중 가장 최악입니다. 마사지를 받는 도중에 나왔으며 ,팁을 요구하는듯했으나, 컴플레인을 거는것을 참고 나왔습니다. 길건너 외부의 스파를 이용하시기 바랍니다. 그외 호탤의 모든것은 완벽했습니다.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Thank you for sharing your feedback with us! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the resort overall, especially the pool and the service from our staff. However, we sincerely apologize for your disappointing experience with the spa. Your comments are very important to us, and we will look into this matter to ensure that it is addressed properly. We're grateful for your understanding and hope that the rest of your stay was pleasant. We look forward to welcoming you again in the future!
Best Regards,
Nguyen Ke Mao - General Manager

Nguyen Ke Mao - General Manager
